opportunities.name: National Lottery Community Fund (England)
opportunities.description: Supports projects that bring people together and improve communities. Ideal for employment training and community programmes. Rolling applications.

opportunities.name: Skinners' Company - Young People's Vocational Development
opportunities.description: Priority funding for Kent-based charities helping NEET young people move into employment. Perfect fit for employment training programmes.

opportunities.name: Thomas Wall Trust
opportunities.description: Supports charities equipping disadvantaged adults with communication skills for employment. Must include accredited vocational qualifications.

opportunities.name: Goldsmiths' Foundation Open Grants
opportunities.description: Funds vocational skills and training in creative/craft industries. Could support construction trades like carpentry or specialist building skills.

opportunities.name: Grocers' Charity Grant
opportunities.description: Small charity grants covering relief of hardship, employment support, and skills development. UK registered charities under £500k turnover.

opportunities.name: King Charles III Small Grants Programme
opportunities.description: Environment and community grants for UK charities with £25k-£500k income. Could support sustainable construction training or community programmes.
opportunities.amount: Up to £3,000 per year (up to 3 years)

opportunities.name: Comic Relief - A Place to Belong
opportunities.description: Core flexible funding for organisations supporting vulnerable young people. Service delivery pathway for regions including Kent (East of England).

opportunities.name: Asda Foundation - Local Community Spaces
opportunities.description: Funding for community spaces bringing people together. Could support training facility improvements or community centre upgrades.

summary: Strong funding landscape for employment and training charities in Kent with multiple opportunities including local priority funding from Skinners' Company and National Lottery, plus sector-specific vocational training grants closing in May-September 2026.
